command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && echo '=== LAUNCHD STATUS ===' && launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep hyo && echo '' && echo '=== FEED REPORTS ===' && python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('agents/sam/website/data/feed.json'))
print(f'Agents: {list(d.get(\"agents\",{}).keys())}')
print(f'Reports: {len(d.get(\"reports\",[]))}')
for r in d['reports']:
    a = r.get('author','?')
    t = r.get('title','?')
    intro = r.get('sections',{}).get('introspection', r.get('sections',{}).get('summary',''))[:80]
    print(f'  {a}: {t}')
    print(f'    → {intro}...')
" && echo '' && echo '=== DISPATCH TEST ===' && bash bin/dispatch.sh health 2>&1 | head -10 && echo '' && echo '=== AETHER DISPATCH TEST ===' && bash bin/dispatch.sh report aether 'nel-verification: testing dispatch registration' 2>&1 && echo '' && echo '=== FORKAI INBOX ===' && cat kai/ledger/forkai-inbox.jsonl | python3 -c "
import sys,json
for line in sys.stdin:
    line=line.strip()
    if not line: continue
    d=json.loads(line)
    print(f'  [{d.get(\"status\")}] {d.get(\"agent\")}: {d.get(\"message\",\"\")[:80]}')
"
